entry.title: Welcome to GhostLight Research
entry.summary: introduction to GhostLight Research and myself
entry.content:
Welcome to GhostLight Research! I, an independent information professional, shine a ghost light on the information you need to know.

I normally don’t capitalize, it’s just a thing I do, so I’m going to start now.

i also have a unique blogging style

which may seem odd

but

hey, that’s me!

look for more updates to the main website and additional entries to this blog in the coming weeks and months
